name: Void -Dementia-
short_description: Action game Void Dementia is characterized by fast action and hardcore production, and is an action game that will amplify the user's sense of challenge and immersion in the game with the story and Roguelike elements of the void area.
detailed_description:
The secret of the void area

I don't know why she's here or what she did here
You must find the piece of memory and find out what this place is and what she is.
Every action in the game is a way for her to bring her memories back.
When she fights enemies and defeats bosses, she can bring back memories of the past.

Swap weapon action

A weapon master who can freely use three types of weapons: katana, dual blade, and greatsword.
She is the best swordsman who can freely switch weapons against her enemies at any time.
If you can find her lost memories, you will be able to use even powerful skills.

Immortal fate

The Void Realm rejects her and threatens her. But she is immortal.
The five bosses, beyond human power, prevent her from leaving the void realm.
She must overcome it and move on.

1.0 official launch
Our game is complete.

Story mode

5 special boss battles
50 skills
19 Masteries
48 challenges
online ranking

Res tower mode

action roguelike game
100th floor stage ready
27 exclusive skills
27 evolution skills
